testcase.name: Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.1-01] AC1: Edit button opens form with pre-populated values
Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.1-02] AC2: Submit button shows "Update Subscription" in edit mode
Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.1-03] AC3: Cancel button exits edit mode and clears form
Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.1-04] AC4: Same name allowed in edit mode (fuzzy match excludes current)
Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.1-05] AC5 + AC6: Real-time list update + success toast
Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.1-06] AC8: Keyboard navigation (Tab, Enter, Escape)
Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.1-07] AC9: Accessibility - WCAG 2.1 Level A compliance
Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.1-08] AC10: Error handling - validation errors display inline
Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.3-01] AC1 + AC2 (4.3): Timestamps - createdAt immutable, updatedAt updated
Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.3-02] AC3 (4.3): Timestamps persist through page reload
Story 4.1 & 4.3: Edit Subscription Workflow + Timestamps › [E2E-4.3-03] Multiple edits create incrementing timestamps
